title: Stripe element not displayed due to missing client secret
symptom: The Stripe payment form does not appear on the published version of the project, and the associated div has 'display: none;'.
applies_when: Payment intent client secret is not set
not_this_if: Payment intent client secret is correctly set
root_cause: The Stripe element requires the payment_intent_client_secret to be present for it to render. If this value is empty, the element will not be displayed, leading to a 'display: none;' style being applied.
fix_steps: Bind the parameter conditional rendering of the Stripe element to the formula: `payment_intent_client_secret != ""`
Republish the project to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Update the conditional rendering for the Stripe element to check for the payment_intent_client_secret and republish the project.
